items.title: ADP National Employment Report: 42K Private Jobs Added In October
items.description: The ADP report revealed a gain of 42,000 private nonfarm jobs in October, up from the 29,000 loss in September.

items.title: The Real Unemployment Rate Is Obscured And Worsening
items.description: The U.S. labor market is weaker than headline unemployment data suggests, with rising involuntary part-time work masking underlying instability. Read the full analysis here.

items.title: JP Morgan's Dimon Says Bank Invested $2 Billion In Detroit Over The Last Decade; Says Bank's Investments In Detroit Helped Reduce Unemployment, Bring Growth; Says Argentina Can Receive $100B In Foreign Investment If President Milei Is Able To Continue Reforms
